title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
slides: Why would OpenAI hire Uber’s India chief?
India is OpenAI’s largest market after the US.
It lacks a local team and regulatory strategy.
Prabhjeet Singh now shapes its India expansion.
Watch for policy shifts that affect your access.
thread_text:
1. Why hire Uber’s India chief?

OpenAI just brought on Prabhjeet Singh, who oversaw Uber’s operations across the region.

2. India is now OpenAI’s second-largest market

It has no local office, no local team, and no formal regulatory strategy.

3. Prabhjeet Singh doesn’t have a regulatory background

His task is to build that missing strategy from scratch.

4. India is debating new data localization rules

Those rules could block models trained on global data from serving Indian users.

5. Test ChatGPT on a prompt about Indian traffic laws today

If the answer differs from local sources, that gap may soon become a compliance issue.
video_script: India is its biggest market after the US.
No local team or regulatory moves yet.
Prabhjeet Singh will shape the expansion.
Watch for policy shifts that affect access.

script: India is its biggest market after the US.
No local team or regulatory moves yet.
Prabhjeet Singh will shape the expansion.

instagram.caption:
OpenAI just hired Uber’s India chief Prabhjeet Singh—but he has no regulatory background. 🧾 India is now OpenAI’s second-largest market, yet the company has zero local staff, no office, and no strategy for new data localization rules. Those rules could block models trained on global data from serving Indian users.

If you use ChatGPT for work or content, any mismatch between its answers and local laws might soon become a compliance problem.

What happens when your AI tool can’t legally reference its own training data?

carousel_slides.description: Prabhjeet Singh, Uber's India head, now leads OpenAI's largest market outside the US without any regulatory background.
No local office, no local team, and no formal regulatory strategy yet.

carousel_slides.hook: He must build strategy from scratch
carousel_slides.description: Lacking regulatory experience, Singh faces new data localization rules that could block global models.

carousel_slides.hook: Data rules may block ChatGPT in India
carousel_slides.description: Proposed laws could prevent models trained on global data from serving Indian users.
